age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/WOMEN/PWD candidates will be as per the Government of India Rules and Regulations.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. / B. Tech. or M. Tech. (Pre-Final Year) from the Science/ Engineering/ Technology stream with knowledge in CAD and ANSYS, B. Tech. in Mechanical Engineering and Fluency in the English language (Desirable)
qualification.details: B.E. / B. Tech. or M. Tech. (Pre-Final Year) from the Science/ Engineering/ Technology stream with knowledge in CAD and ANSYS. B. Tech. in Mechanical Engineering and Fluency in the English language (Desirable).

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at NIT Silchar?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Assistant post at NIT Silchar is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.E. / B. Tech. or M. Tech. (Pre-Final Year) from a Science/ Engineering/ Technology stream with knowledge in CAD and ANSYS. A B. Tech. in Mechanical Engineering and fluency in English are desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/WOMEN/PWD candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Project Assistant recruitment at NIT Silchar?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent via email. You need to prepare your application with bio-data and attach self-attested copies of required documents before sending it to the official email address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITS Dean(R&C)/ME/676/04/2026.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the National Institute of Technology Silchar.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article, and further details are available on the official website of NIT Silchar.
